facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this café. Big mistake. AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar Phu Quoc sits inside Happy Bear Hostel on 179 30/4 Street, easy to miss if you don't know. 4.9 stars across 458 reviews. That number doesn't happen by accident. Good coffee, real atmosphere, the kind of spot locals actually return to. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 458 people gave this café 4.9 stars and it's still under the radar. AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar inside Happy Bear Hostel. Your morning just got better. Tag your travel buddy.
